properties.displayName: Suspicious Web-based Command and Control Patterns
properties.description: Detects suspicious web-based command and control communication patterns
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (user_agent|contains has "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 6.0; Windows NT 5.1)" or user_agent|contains has "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 7.0; Windows NT 5.1)" or user_agent|contains has "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 8.0; Windows NT 5.1)" or user_agent|contains has "python-requests" or user_agent|contains has "python-urllib" or user_agent|contains has "curl" or user_agent|contains has "wget" or user_agent|contains has "PowerShell" or user_agent|contains has "WinHTTP" or user_agent|contains has "") and method == "POST" and request_body_len == ">1024" and (uri|contains has "/admin" or uri|contains has "/panel" or uri|contains has "/gate" or uri|contains has "/log" or uri|contains has "/upload" or uri|contains has "/download" or uri|contains has "/data" or uri|contains has ".php?id=" or uri|contains has ".aspx?id=" or uri|contains has ".jsp?id=") and request_body_len == "<100" and status_code == "200"
